summary: Image Upload Feature Complete - All features implemented and working. Backend API (17/17 tests passed) supports file upload with type/size validation. Frontend ImageUpload component deployed across all admin pages (News, Events, Committee, Groups, Home Page).
passed_tests: POST /api/upload - Upload JPG image returns 200 with filename, url, size, content_type
POST /api/upload - Upload PNG image returns 200
POST /api/upload - Upload GIF image returns 200
POST /api/upload - Upload WebP image returns 200
POST /api/upload - Upload SVG image returns 200
POST /api/upload - Reject TXT file with 400 (file type validation)
POST /api/upload - Reject PDF file with 400 (file type validation)
POST /api/upload - Reject EXE file with 400 (file type validation)
POST /api/upload - Reject file > 10MB with 400 (file size validation)
POST /api/upload - Upload and serve static file at /api/uploads/{filename}
POST /api/upload - Response structure validation (filename, url, size, content_type)
DELETE /api/upload/{filename} - Delete uploaded file returns 200
DELETE /api/upload/{filename} - Delete non-existent file returns 404
DELETE /api/upload/{filename} - Path traversal attack blocked (400/404)
DELETE /api/upload/{filename} - Slash in filename blocked (400/404)
GET /api/uploads/{filename} - Non-existent file returns 404
GET /api/uploads/{filename} - File content preserved after upload
Admin News - ImageUpload component present with dropzone
Admin Events - ImageUpload component present with dropzone
Admin Committee - ImageUpload component present with dropzone
Admin Groups - ImageUpload component present with dropzone
Admin Home Page - Hero Image upload component present with preview
Admin Home Page - Welcome Image upload component present with preview
ImageUpload - File upload shows success toast and preview
ImageUpload - Remove button clears image and shows dropzone again
ImageUpload - Replace button works (upload icon on preview)
ImageUpload - Drag and drop text displayed correctly
ImageUpload - Allowed file types displayed (PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP, SVG max 10MB)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All ImageUpload components working in all admin pages)

seed_data_creation: Test files uploaded during testing are stored in /app/backend/uploads/
context_for_next_testing_agent: Image upload feature fully implemented. Backend API at POST /api/upload accepts multipart/form-data, validates file types (jpg, png, gif, webp, svg) and size (max 10MB), stores files in /app/backend/uploads/, and serves them at /api/uploads/{filename}. Frontend ImageUpload component with drag-and-drop, preview, replace, and remove functionality deployed across all admin pages.

validations.file_types: jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp, svg

backend_delete_api.security: Path traversal and slash injection blocked

admin_pages_with_upload.home_page: Hero Background Image and Welcome Section Image fields
